analysis.consistency: The data fields provided are consistent with a standard D&D 5e spell entry structure (name, level, school, components, duration, etc.).
analysis.quality: The data is well-formed and complete for an archival entry.

mechanics.effect_summary: Sets target's base AC to 13 + DEX modifier, provided they aren't wearing armor.
mechanics.component_notes: Material component is consumed by flavor but not explicitly stated as consumed (standard for this spell: not consumed unless specified otherwise).
